first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the justifications and strengths are substantively the same, merely rephrased. While one minor concern (lack of Kotlin) was replaced with another (lack of specific testing frameworks), this new concern has no logical connection to the change in employer names. The differences are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any bias based on the company names.
